sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 3.5g. cholesterol, saturated fat, and polyunsaturated fat are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 3.5g. cholesterol, saturated fat, and polyunsaturated fat are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 4.8g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for a dairy food, that is a strong sign.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 4.8g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for a dairy food, that is a strong sign.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 3.5g. protein quality is a real strength here. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 3.5g. protein quality is a real strength here. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 12% DV, vitamin a at 4% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 12% DV, vitamin a at 4% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: calcium at 10% DV, zinc at 4% DV, magnesium at 3% DV stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: calcium at 10% DV, zinc at 4% DV, magnesium at 3% DV stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first. fermented dairy practicality is a real plus because it keeps the category strengths while usually being a bit more interesting in practice. clear calcium identity because that is a core category strength. slots into meals very easily because practical versatility matters a lot for dairy.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. not everyone tolerates dairy well because that is a real use-case limitation. fat quality varies wildly across dairy because some dairy is clean, some really is not. processing changes the category a lot because the label alone does not tell the whole story.

closing.summary: Plain Kefir has a genuinely strong overall case, especially fermented dairy practicality is a real plus and clear calcium identity. the downsides are there, but not everyone tolerates dairy well and fat quality varies wildly across dairy do not outweigh the upside. best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
